title: Inside India newsletter: India’s investment appeal dims as firms and funds pivot to the U.S.
summary_full: AI-driven growth and 'America-first' policies are pulling global capital to the U.S., challenging India's appeal as the fastest-growing economy.
summary_public: AI-driven growth and 'America-first' policies are pulling global capital to the U.S., challenging India's appeal as the fastest-growing economy.
